Warrant - Bench Warrant Return 03/23/23 FTA STATUS OF DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
DEFT MOT MODIFY COND OF RELEASE-REMOVAL OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING FILED

/CAL: DISPOSITION BEFORE JUDGE VAN AKEN/MISDRED1: 5/CTORD: 1 YEAR DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT/TEXT: DEFERD ENTRY OF JDGMNT; DEF ENTS NO CONTEST PLEA& REFRD TO DIVERSN/DEFT ADV NL: 5/FNDG/GTW/CPSS/X:  THIS IS A 1 YEAR DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT WITH TERMS AS FOLLOWS:/WS/WEAP/X: THE CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER (CPO) REMAINS IN EFFECT/DEF: SHALL NOT INCUR ANY CPO VIOLATIONS/DEF: SHALL COMPLETE 12 ANGER MANAGEMENT SESSIONS THROUGH PRETRIAL DIVERSION WITH PROGRESS REPORTS TO DEPARTMENT 12/X: UPON SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF DEJ, PLEA MAY BE WITHDRAWN AND CASE DISMISSED WITH PROPER FILING OF AMOTION,/

/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/X: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED,/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPSDEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ONTHE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: FUTURE COURT DATE OF 10-07-21 IS CONFIRMED,/DAWF/
/CAL:TRIAL/LD:12-07-20/X:PUBLIC DEFENDER'S ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS PURS TOPC1382 DENIED BY THE COURT/CAUSE1/CTORD:DEFT IS RELIEVED OF WOMEN'S GROUP PROGRAM/DEF:TO CONTINUE CHECK INS WITH ACM/CONT/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/GTW/987,2/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND TO SET TRIAL/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INVOFF:SGT, GLENN BRAKEL/WITEXCL:DEFENSE/WIT SWORN DA:SFPD OFFICER ISAAC VALENZUELA/WIT SWORN DA:SFPD OFFICER AARON DJORKQUIST/WIT SWORN DA:SFPD SGT, GLENN BRAKEL/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1, 11-PAGE DOCUMENT CONSISTING OF TEXT MESSAGE SCREEN SHOTS; PEOPLE'S 2, 2-PAGE DOCUMENT CONSISTING OF TEXT MESSAGE SCREEN SHOTS/X:DEFENSE ORAL MOTION FOR MISDEMEANOR REDUCTION IS DENIED,/X:TO CONFORM TO PROOF AFTER HEARING, THE COURT AMENDS THE COMPLAINT AS FOLLOWS:/X:COUNT 2, PC 422, IS AMENDED FROM A MISDEMEANOR TO A FELONY,/HTA1:1,2,3,4,5,6/DEF:REMAINS OUT OF CUSTODY ON ASSERTIVECASE MANAGEMENT/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/ /X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHERORDER OF COURT,/

/CAL: STATUS OF M99/ACM/NTW60/LDPX: 08-10-20/TE: 2 HOURS/X:AS A CONDITIONOF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/WEAP/WS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX: 07-23-20(30TH) 08-10-20 (60TH)/987,2/BAIL: 50000/X:WITHOUT PREJUDICE/SAORD/SA1: TIAMANIKA BLACKBURN/SAORD3/WS/CONTD: STATUS OF M99 20006591/DOP/
/CAL: JURY TRIAL, LD 12-07-20/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 10/TRANS 10:FORTHWITH FOR DISPOSITION/
/CAL: TRIAL, LD 12-07-20 (COVID19), TE 2 WEEKS, (1382PC DENIED 04-23-21)/DAWT/CONT/SB: 4 HOURS/
/CAL: TRIAL, LD 12-07-20 (COVID19), TE 2 WEEKS, (DEF 1382PC DENIED 04-23-21)/X: PEOPLE READY/X: DEFENSE READY/CAUSE/CONT/SB: 4 HOURS/
/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY CONDITIONS OF RELEASE, LD 12-07-20 (COVID19)/MO GRTD/EMTERM/X: FUTURE DATE 10-07-21 CONFIRMED/
/CLA: TRIAL, LD 12-07-20 (COVID19) (1382PC DENIED ON 04-23-21)/DAWT/CAUSE/TE: 2 WEEKS/CONT/SB: 4 HOURS/
